glosses.vi: sự nghiệp; con đường nghề nghiệp
glosses.ja: キャリア; 職業の道

sentences.target: Ich starte meine Karriere in Berlin.

translations.de: Ich starte meine Karriere in Berlin.
translations.en: I'm starting my career in Berlin.
translations.es: Estoy empezando mi carrera en Berlín.
translations.fr: Je commence ma carrière à Berlin.
translations.it: Sto iniziando la mia carriera a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在柏林开始我的职业生涯。
translations.yue: 我喺柏林開始我嘅事業。
translations.pt: Estou começando minha carreira em Berlim.
translations.he: אני מתחיל את הקריירה שלי בברלין.
translations.vi: Tôi bắt đầu sự nghiệp của mình ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Ik begin mijn carrière in Berlijn.
translations.hi: मैं अपना करियर बर्लिन में शुरू कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ξεκινάω την καριέρα μου στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Jeg starter karrieren min i Berlin.
translations.id: Saya mulai karier saya di Berlin.
translations.sv: Jag börjar min karriär i Berlin.
translations.da: Jeg starter min karriere i Berlin.
translations.ja: ベルリンでキャリアを始めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; head predicate of the clause.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies 'Karriere'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of 'starte'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; governs 'Berlin'.
Proper noun (place name); object of the preposition 'in'.

translations.en: She's pursuing a career as a nurse.
translations.zh-Hans: 她正在走护士的职业道路。
translations.yue: 佢喺護士呢行發展事業。
translations.pt: Ela está fazendo carreira como enfermeira.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang theo đuổi sự nghiệp làm y tá.
translations.hi: वह नर्स के रूप में करियर बना रही है.
translations.ro: Ea face carieră ca asistentă medicală.
translations.ja: 彼女は看護師としてキャリアを積んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; light verb in the collocation 'Karriere machen'.
Common noun, feminine; internal object in the light-verb construction 'Karriere machen'.
Preposition marking a role/profession complement; introduces the NP 'Krankenschwester'.
Compound common noun, feminine; complement of 'als' (bare role NP, typically nominative).

sentences.target: Meine Karriere läuft gerade ganz gut.

translations.de: Meine Karriere läuft gerade ganz gut.
translations.en: My career is going pretty well right now.
translations.es: Mi carrera va bastante bien ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Ma carrière se porte plutôt bien en ce moment.
translations.it: La mia carriera sta andando piuttosto bene in questo periodo.
translations.ko: 요즘 제 커리어가 꽤 잘 풀리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在的职业发展挺顺利的。
translations.yue: 我而家嘅事業進展得幾好。
translations.ru: Моя карьера сейчас идёт довольно неплохо.
translations.pt: Minha carreira está indo bem no momento.
translations.he: הקריירה שלי הולכת די טוב כרגע.
translations.tr: Şu anda kariyerim oldukça iyi gidiyor.
translations.vi: Sự nghiệp của tôi dạo này tiến triển khá tốt.
translations.ar: مسيرتي المهنية تسير بشكل جيد في الوقت الحالي.
translations.nl: Mijn carrière gaat op dit moment best goed.
translations.uk: Моя кар’єра зараз іде досить добре.
translations.hu: A karrierem most elég jól alakul.
translations.hi: अभी मेरा करियर काफी अच्छा चल रहा है.
translations.pl: Moja kariera teraz idzie całkiem dobrze.
translations.el: Η καριέρα μου πάει αρκετά καλά αυτή την περίοδο.
translations.nb: Karrieren min går ganske bra nå.
translations.id: Karier saya lagi berjalan cukup baik sekarang.
translations.sv: Min karriär går ganska bra just nu.
translations.ro: Cariera mea merge destul de bine acum.
translations.cs: Moje kariéra teď jde docela dobře.
translations.da: Min karriere går rigtig fint lige nu.
translations.ja: 今、私のキャリアはかなり順調です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular nominative 'Karriere'; modifies the subject.
Common noun, feminine; nominative subject of 'läuft'.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here idiomatic meaning ‘is going/progressing’.
Adverb of time; modifies the verb, indicating the present time frame.
Degree adverb (intensifier); modifies the predicate adjective 'gut'.
Predicate adjective expressing evaluation; complements the clause’s predication (modified by 'ganz').

sentences.target: Er denkt über seine Karriere nach.

translations.de: Er denkt über seine Karriere nach.
translations.en: He is thinking about his career.
translations.ko: 그는 자신의 커리어에 대해 생각하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在思考自己的职业生涯。
translations.yue: 佢喺度諗緊自己嘅事業。
translations.pt: Ele está pensando na carreira dele.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang nghĩ về sự nghiệp của mình.
translations.nl: Hij denkt na over zijn carrière.
translations.hi: वह अपने करियर के बारे में सोच रहा है.
translations.ro: El se gândește la cariera lui.
translations.ja: 彼は自分のキャリアについて考えています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; base of the separable verb 'nachdenken'.
Preposition introducing a PP complement (accusative) specifying the topic of thinking.
Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular accusative 'Karriere'; modifies the PP’s noun.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'über'.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'nachdenken'; occurs in final position.
